name: Fabrknt Dynamic Fees
description: Volatility-responsive dynamic fee engine for AMMs. Computes realized volatility, classifies market regimes, calculates optimal swap fees, recommends LP ranges, and estimates impermanent loss — all in real time.
author: Fabrknt

endpoints.name: Compute Volatility
endpoints.description: Compute realized volatility from an array of price observations

endpoints.name: Get Regime
endpoints.description: Get current volatility regime classification for a pool

endpoints.name: Calculate Fee
endpoints.description: Calculate the dynamic fee for a given volatility level

endpoints.name: Fee Schedule
endpoints.description: Get the full fee schedule mapping regimes to fee tiers

endpoints.name: Simulate Fees
endpoints.description: Simulate fee revenue over a historical volatility series

endpoints.name: LP Range
endpoints.description: Get recommended LP tick range based on current volatility

endpoints.name: IL Estimate
endpoints.description: Estimate impermanent loss for a concentrated liquidity position
